title: Is the Evangelion manga censored
wikitext:
[]: Is the Evangelion manga censored?             Quote Post by x25 » Sun Sep 06, 2009 3:48 pm Does anyone know if the Evangelion manga is censored by viz?

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sun Sep 06, 2009 3:54 pm Nope, the manga shows all the intended nudity. Like the female cast's breasts to Shinji's penis.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Sep 06, 2009 3:56 pm Shinji has a tiny weenie lol

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Sep 06, 2009 4:45 pm I have the original Japanese, as well as the original issue based comic books style release, as well as the first and second edition versions, standard editions, and collectors editions. The Evangelion manga has never been censored. It was originally available in a flopped version with English Sound Effects, as was the common practice, however those editions are no longer reasonably available. Interestingly, the Evangelion manga has the distinction of being the first manga in America to be sold in its original orientation with Japanese sound effects, largely at Sadamoto's insistence.

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Sun Sep 06, 2009 8:57 pm I thought showing uncensored genitalia was illegal in Japan...

[]:             Quote Post by Orphan Of Darkness » Sun Sep 06, 2009 10:01 pm Teague wrote: I thought showing uncensored genitalia was illegal in Japan...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Sep 06, 2009 11:08 pm Teague wrote: I thought showing uncensored genitalia was illegal in Japan...

[]:             Quote Post by x25 » Mon Sep 07, 2009 1:01 am Thanks all for the replies

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Mon Sep 07, 2009 1:07 am Teague wrote: I thought showing uncensored genitalia was illegal in Japan...

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Sep 07, 2009 2:55 am Based off most of their drawn and animated media (that's not creepy fat guy porn stuff) Japanese for the most part don't have nipples.

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Mon Sep 07, 2009 3:58 am If they have laws against showing male genitalia, then I'm confused for why the manga shows Shinji's penis. Maybe its ok since Sadamoto didn't define it too much or sexualize it in any way.

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Mon Sep 07, 2009 5:50 am In my understanding, Japanese censorship applies to pvbic hair and nipples.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Sep 07, 2009 1:02 pm LiLi wrote: In my understanding...

[]:             Quote Post by LiLi » Mon Sep 07, 2009 1:29 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Not that anime/manga characters ever have body hair -- they just have pixellations (animation) or odd narrow black bars (print).

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Mon Sep 07, 2009 6:56 pm I've seen plenty of manga that don't bother to censor nipples, although in mostly unerotic context (bath house, etc), on the other hand the majority utilise 'Anime Anatomy' On actual H works, it can get wierd...in animation you normally get a white/black silhouette, although i've never seen nipples censored...in printed works, sometimes you get this horrifying mass of pixels, other times you get this neat little black bar that doesn't actually conceal anything, and at a glance makes it seem like the characters have been branded with a barcode...

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Tue Sep 08, 2009 4:19 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: It was originally available in a flopped version with English Sound Effects, as was the common practice, however those editions are no longer reasonably available.

[]:             Quote Post by MatrixRefugee » Mon Oct 05, 2009 1:38 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I have the original Japanese, as well as the original issue based comic books style release, as well as the first and second edition versions, standard editions, and collectors editions. The Evangelion manga has never been censored. It was originally available in a flopped version with English Sound Effects, as was the common practice, however those editions are no longer reasonably available. Interestingly, the Evangelion manga has the distinction of being the first manga in America to be sold in its original orientation with Japanese sound effects, largely at Sadamoto's insistence.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Mon Oct 05, 2009 2:24 pm In Japan the only real legal limit is that if you're going to show someone's genitals in graphic detail, you have to draw at last one line on it somewhere. It doesn't actually hide anything at all, but they're kind of weird in that way.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Wed Oct 07, 2009 12:39 am The Eva Monkey wrote: I have the original Japanese, as well as the original issue based comic books style release, as well as the first and second edition versions, standard editions, and collectors editions. The Evangelion manga has never been censored. It was originally available in a flopped version with English Sound Effects, as was the common practice, however those editions are no longer reasonably available. Interestingly, the Evangelion manga has the distinction of being the first manga in America to be sold in its original orientation with Japanese sound effects, largely at Sadamoto's insistence.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Oct 07, 2009 3:50 am THREAD wrote: Intelligent question about censorship of Evangelion. discussion wrote: Intelligent answers about censorship revolving around the penis of an Evangelion character.
summary:
[]: Is the Evangelion manga censored?             Quote Post by x25 » Sun Sep 06, 2009 3:48 pm Does anyone know if the Evangelion manga is censored by viz?

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sun Sep 06, 2009 3:54 pm Nope, the manga shows all the intended nudity. Like the female cast's breasts to Shinji's penis.

Article: Is the Evangelion manga censored
[]: Is the Evangelion manga censored?             Quote Post by x25 » Sun Sep 06, 2009 3:48 pm Does anyone know if the Evangelion manga is censored by viz?

[]:             Quote Post by The Goose » Sun Sep 06, 2009 3:54 pm Nope, the manga shows all the intended nudity. Like the female cast's breasts to Shinji's penis.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Sep 06, 2009 3:56 pm Shinji has a tiny weenie lol

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Sep 06, 2009 4:45 pm I have the original Japanese, as well as the original issue based comic books style release, as well as the first and second edition versions, standard editions, and collectors editions. The Evangelion manga has never been censored. It was originally available in a flopped version with English Sound Effects, as was the common practice, however those editions are no longer reasonably available. Interestingly, the Evangelion manga has the distinction of being the first manga in America to be sold in its original orientation with Japanese sound effects, largely at Sadamoto's insistence.
